member.name: T:Acontplus.Billing.Constants.DocumentTypes
member.summary: SRI Electronic Document Type Codes (Ecuador) Based on SRI Ficha Técnica v2.32

member.name: F:Acontplus.Billing.Constants.DocumentTypes.LiquidacionCompra
member.summary: Purchase Settlement - Liquidación de Compra de Bienes y Prestación de Servicios (Code: 03)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Billing.Constants.DocumentTypes.GetDocumentName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the document type name in Spanish

member.name: M:Acontplus.Billing.Constants.DocumentTypes.IsValidDocumentCode(System.String)
member.summary: Validates if a document code is valid according to SRI normatives

member.name: M:Acontplus.Billing.Interfaces.Services.IAtsXmlService.CreateAtsXmlAsync(Acontplus.Billing.Models.Documents.AtsData)
member.param: The data required to generate the ATS XML.
member.returns: A byte array representing the generated XML.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Billing.Interfaces.Services.ISriSigner
member.summary: Signs XML comprobantes with XAdES-BES format for SRI Ecuador.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Billing.Interfaces.Services.ISriSigner.SignAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Signs an XML comprobante with XAdES-BES (RSA-SHA1) for SRI Ecuador, replicating the MITyCLibXADES output expected by the SRI web service. The CPU-bound signing work is offloaded to the thread pool so the calling thread is never blocked — safe for high-concurrency and background usage.
member.param: Raw bytes of the PFX/P12 certificate file.
Cancellation token to abort the operation.
member.returns: The signed XML string ready for SRI reception.
member.exception: Thrown when is not exactly 49 digits, or when required parameters are null or empty.
Thrown when the certificate does not contain an RSA private key, or when the XML document has no root element.
Thrown when the PFX password is incorrect or the certificate is corrupt.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Billing.Services.Signing.SriSigner
member.summary: Signs XML comprobantes with XAdES-BES format for SRI Ecuador, replicating the MITyCLibXADES output: RSA-SHA1, SHA-1 digests, and three references (SignedProperties | KeyInfo | comprobante).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Billing.Services.Signing.SriSigner.SignCore(System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Performs the synchronous XAdES-BES signing work.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Billing.Services.Signing.SriSigner.Elem(System.Xml.XmlDocument,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an element with a single attribute; convenience for algorithm elements.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Billing.Services.Signing.SriSigner.C14NBytes(System.Xml.XmlElement)
member.summary: Returns the canonical (C14N) byte representation of . The element is wrapped in a fresh document so that inherited namespace declarations do not bleed into the canonical form.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Billing.Services.Signing.SriSigner.HexSerialToDec(System.String)
M:Acontplus.Billing.Services.Signing.SriSigner.GetId(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a cryptographically random integer in [, ). Intentionally uses rather than to prevent predictable ID enumeration.
